full_name: South Orange County Pool Service & Repair
tagline: Crystal Clean Pools. Coast to Canyon.
hero_subheadline: Family-Owned & Operated Pool Service and Repairs
about: Since 2005, South OC Pools Service and Repairs has provided high-quality swimming pool and spa repair and maintenance services throughout Orange County, California. As a small business, our team of experts is committed to delivering excellent customer service. South OC Pools is an owner-operated company, and we treat every job with the care and attention it deserves to ensure 100% satisfaction. From cleaning and repairs to upgrades — or even those unusual pool maintenance situations — we've got you covered! We'll keep your pool clean and clear all season long.
about_extended: At South OC Pools, we're a proud family-owned company built on trust, integrity, and exceptional service. Your satisfaction is our top priority, and we go above and beyond to keep your pool clean, clear, and stress-free. Our approach is straightforward: show up on time, do quality work, and keep communication clear and honest. We focus on long-term care and proactive service, not just surface-level cleanings. Our clients know we take pride in what we do and that we're always available to help when something comes up. Every technician on our team undergoes a comprehensive background check and professional training before ever stepping foot on a job site.

services.name: Upgrades
items: Pumps, Heaters, Motors, Valve, & LED Lights

testimonials.text: Steve, thank you for your great service. I've been recommending your pool cleaning and repair services to my family and friends. Thanks again!
testimonials.author: Ali Altai

testimonials.text: Steve and his crew at South OC Pools have maintained my pool and spa for over five years. They are prompt, reliable and can fix most any problem that arises. They recently installed the Pentair system for me so that I can turn on all my pool equipment from my phone. It's a pretty fantastic system as are Steve and his guys. I highly recommend South OC Pools.
testimonials.author: Gayle Grosch

testimonials.text: Thank you Steve for such great service care and restoration work. Our pool looks so great. I am recommending you and your company to everyone I know that has a pool.
testimonials.author: Ron And Kathleen Kurrle

testimonials.text: We tried several pool companies in the past (with not so great results), but we are now 100% satisfied with SOCP!! Steve always provides us with honest, reliable & professional service! Our pool has never looked better, and Steve really stepped up and replaced our outdated filter pump on extremely short notice so our pool was up and running for the weekend. We are very happy long-term customers of SOCP, and we highly recommend Steve & his company all South OC pool owners.
testimonials.author: Sue & Bill Mcdonough

testimonials.text: I developed a pool pump issue over the weekend before Xmas that needed attention quickly, my neighbor recommended Steve at South OC Pool Service. I left a message on Sunday and he called me the next day and we set up an appointment time for that day. Steve was there promptly at the designated time, assessed the problem, gave me an estimate and performed the repair all within a few hours. His work is professional, and his prices are very fair. I highly recommend him to anyone who is in need of pool service.
testimonials.author: Gary Ward
